```bash
nl -ba llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp | sed -n '7420,7455p' && sed -n '1,$p' llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp | awk 'BEGIN{print "----- applying patch -----"} /computeBestVF\(\)/,/\}/{print} END{print "----- end context -----"}' && python3 - <<'PY'
import re,sys
path="llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp"
s=open(path).read()
start=s.find("VectorizationFactor LoopVectorizationPlanner::computeBestVF()")
if start==-1:
    print("computeBestVF not found"); sys.exit(1)
# Patch the assert: replace it with a runtime check that aligns BestFactor with LegacyVF when disagreement.
s_new=re.sub(
    r'assert\s*\(\s*\(BestFactor\.Width == LegacyVF\.Width \|\| planContainsAdditionalSimplifications\(getPlanFor\(BestFactor\.Width\), CostCtx, OrigLoop\)\)\s*&&\s*".*?"\s*\);\s*',
    'if (!(BestFactor.Width == LegacyVF.Width || planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(BestFactor.Width), CostCtx, OrigLoop))) {\n'
    '  LLVM_DEBUG(dbgs() << "LV: VPlan and legacy cost models disagreed; preferring legacy VF to avoid crash.\\n");\n'
    '  BestFactor = LegacyVF;\n'
    '}\n',
    s
)
if s==s_new:
    print("No change made, pattern not found")
else:
    open(path,"w").write(s_new)
    print("Patched computeBestVF assertion handling")
PY
&& /llvm-autofix/build/llvm-build/111874/bin/opt -p loop-vectorize -S /tmp/test.ll
```

  if (VPlans.empty())
    return VectorizationFactor::Disabled();
  // If there is a single VPlan with a single VF, return it directly.
  VPlan &FirstPlan = *VPlans[0];
